patch_title: Patch 7.51 Notes | FINAL FANTASY XIV, The Lodestone

new_content.name: Dancing Mad (Ultimate)
new_content.description: The seventh installment of the ultimate raid series. A high-end duty featuring a phantasmal harlequin.

new_content.name: Cosmic Exploration Sidequests
new_content.description: New sidequests leading to new exploration on Auxesia for Disciples of the Hand or Land.

new_content.name: Custom Deliveries: Tiisol Ja
new_content.description: New custom deliveries featuring Tiisol Ja for Disciples of the Hand or Land, starting with the quest 'Taco Time'.

glamour.name: Palazzo Diamond weapons
glamour.description: Weapons obtained as a reward for completing Dancing Mad (Ultimate).
